risk_title: Project Implementation Suspended Due to Political Instability
risk_summary: The Afghanistan Resilience Trust Fund (ARTF) component was canceled and IDA grants remain suspended due to the extraordinary political situation in Afghanistan, preventing effective project implementation.
evidence_quote: The Afghanistan Resilience Trust Fund (ARTF) in the project was canceled based on the consideration that the project cannot be effectively implemented under the current extraordinary situation in Afghanistan. Undisbursed IDA grants under this project will remain suspended until a decision is made by the World Bank

risk_title: Political and Governance Fragility Affecting Implementation
risk_summary: Political and governance risks remain rated as High, indicating significant fragility in the operating environment that constrains project execution and institutional capacity.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance [Risk Category Rating]: High [at Approval], High [Previous Rating], High [Current Rating]

risk_title: Zero Project Progress on Core Indicators
risk_summary: All PDO and intermediate results indicators show zero actual progress since project approval in December 2020, with no beneficiaries reached and no infrastructure constructed, suggesting implementation has stalled due to the operating environment.
evidence_quote: People provided with access to improved water sources (Number, Corporate) Baseline: 0.00, Actual (Current): 0.00, End Target: 880,000.00... Water supply network constructed under the project (Kilometers, Custom) Baseline: 0.00, Actual (Current): 0.00, End Target: 400.00

risk_title: Institutional Capacity Constraints in Fragile Context
risk_summary: Institutional capacity for implementation and sustainability is rated as Substantial risk, reflecting challenges in AUWSSC's ability to execute project activities in the current governance environment.
evidence_quote: Institutional Capacity for Implementation and Sustainability [Risk Category Rating]: Substantial [at Approval], Substantial [Previous Rating], Substantial [Current Rating]
